pi_items.source: Setup script creates export directory and export_result.sh writes to this path
Setup script creates diagram file at this exact path
Appears in investigation_report_882.txt as intermediary shareholder owning 60% of OmniVerse
Appears in investigation_report_882.txt as intermediary shareholder owning 40% of OmniVerse
Appears in investigation_report_882.txt as trust entity owning 70% of Stratosphere Holdings
Appears in investigation_report_882.txt as shareholder in both Stratosphere (30%) and Terra Firma (50%)
Appears in investigation_report_882.txt as shareholder in Terra Firma (50%) and beneficiary of Nebula Trust (100%)
Investigation report references FATF '25% Rule' for UBO identification

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic beneficial ownership (UBO) mapping exercise involving a fictional company structure. All entities (OmniVerse Logistics, Stratosphere Holdings, Terra Firma Ventures, Nebula Trust, Elena R., Marcus T.) are created for training purposes. The ownership calculations are mathematically correct: Elena R. has 38% effective ownership (18% through Stratosphere + 20% through Terra Firma), and Marcus T. has 62% effective ownership (20% through Terra Firma + 42% through Nebula Trust's stake in Stratosphere). Both exceed the 25% FATF UBO threshold. The task requires creating a diagram in draw.io at /home/ga/Diagrams/omniverse_structure.drawio and exporting it as a PDF to /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/omniverse_ubo_map.pdf.
